name: 25_Speech_Emotion_Recognition_CNN_LSTM_RAVDESS_DL
query: Ninatafuta mradi wa utambuzi wa hisia za sauti kwa kutumia mfano wa CNN-LSTM na seti ya data ya RAVDESS, ambayo inapaswa kupakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess). Mradi unapaswa kupakia seti ya data na kufanya usindikaji wa sauti thabiti (kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa) na uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC, vilivyotekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa CNN-LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Usahihi wa utambuzi unapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/recognition_accuracy.txt`, na matriki ya mkanganyiko inapaswa kuzalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, API ya ndani inayofaa mtumiaji inapaswa kuundwa kwa kutumia Flask ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia, na utekelezaji unajumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka sawa, unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
API ya ndani inaundwa kwa kutumia "Flask" ili kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili za sauti na kupokea matokeo ya utambuzi wa hisia. Utekelezaji unapaswa kujumuishwa katika `src/hci.py`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji wa sauti inapaswa kuwa thabiti, kupunguza kelele kwa ufanisi huku ikihifadhi uadilifu wa ishara za sauti.
API ya ndani inapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ikiwa na maelekezo wazi ya kupakia faili na kufasiri matokeo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "RAVDESS" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ambayo inapakuliwa kutoka Kaggle au [kiungo hiki cha Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/xbgoose/ravdess).

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder with no actual implementation for loading the RAVDESS dataset. The `load_dataset()` function returns a dummy dictionary and does not contain code to download or load data from Kaggle or Hugging Face. The trajectory evidence mentions steps related to downloading and saving the dataset, but the actual code file does not reflect this functionality. Therefore, the requirement for loading the RAVDESS dataset in `src/data_loader.py` is not satisfied based on the code evidence.

The file only includes placeholder functions and requirement definitions, with no actual audio processing or feature extraction logic. The trajectory evidence further confirms that attempts to execute the file resulted in `ModuleNotFoundError` for `librosa`, indicating the necessary library for MFCC extraction was not successfully integrated or used in the implementation.

There is no actual CNN-LSTM model architecture implementation (convolutional layers, LSTM layers, dense layers, etc.) present in the file content. The trajectory evidence mentions successful execution and console output showing a model structure, but the actual file content does not contain any model implementation code, only meta-information.

The `recognition_accuracy.txt` file contains placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual accuracy metrics. This indicates the requirement to store recognition accuracy in that file is not fulfilled, as no valid accuracy data is present.

The requirement is not satisfied because the key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the `confusion_matrix.png` file: "No endpoints found that support image input". While the trajectory evidence indicates the file was created and uploaded without reported errors, the current evaluation cannot verify the file's content or successful generation due to the access error. The existence of the file path is confirmed, but its validity and content as a confusion matrix cannot be assessed from the provided evidence.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/hci.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder code. It does not implement a functional Flask API with endpoints for audio file upload and emotion recognition. The execution evidence further confirms this, as attempts to run the file resulted in `ModuleNotFoundError` for `flask` and `speech_recognition`, indicating the actual API logic is missing and the implementation cannot perform the required tasks.
